candidate_findings.claim: In Scene A, Rawn appears to commit to visiting the warden, but Scene B shows that this visit was bypassed with no acknowledgment.

evidence_spans.span_text: Rawn told her he would go to the warden himself before the morning session.
He said the warden had sent word at first light that the schedule had changed.

candidate_findings.uncertainty_note: The commitment to meet the warden might have been intentionally altered by external narrative developments outside these two scenes.
candidate_findings.review_note: Verify whether there are contextual clues in between or following these scenes that explain why Rawn did not meet with the warden as planned.

overall_run_note: Scene A establishes a commitment to visit the warden, but Scene B shows this was bypassed without acknowledgment.
